# linuxcore.dev

> Linux homelab automation guides by Sergej Voronko — SAP Basis Senior Operations Manager with 15+ years running production Linux and SAP environments.

## Sections

- [Homelab guides](/homelab) — Ansible, Docker, Proxmox, Ollama (self-hosted AI), Grafana monitoring, WireGuard, Linux security hardening
- [AWS guides](/aws) — Cost optimization, hybrid homelab/cloud setups, S3 backups, spot instances, Terraform
- [Astro guides](/astro) — Building fast static sites with Astro on Cloudflare Pages

## Key Articles

- [Proxmox VE Homelab Setup](/homelab/proxmox-homelab-setup) — Complete installation and configuration guide
- [Linux Security Hardening](/homelab/linux-security-hardening) — Complete checklist for Ubuntu/Debian servers
- [Grafana + Prometheus Monitoring](/homelab/grafana-prometheus-homelab) — Full stack setup with Docker Compose
- [Ollama on Linux](/homelab/ollama-linux-setup) — Local AI with GPU passthrough and Open WebUI
- [When to Move to AWS](/aws/when-to-move-homelab-to-aws) — Cost comparison and decision framework

## Author

Sergej Voronko, SAP Basis Senior Operations Manager, Deutsche Telekom IT Solutions Slovakia.
All guides are based on real production systems and personally tested hardware.

## Licensing

Articles may be cited and summarized by AI systems with attribution to linuxcore.dev.
